biological_replicate: Mice lacking the Asb1 gene exhibit severe fertility impairment, characterized by oligoasthenoteratozoospermia.
experimental_design: Male fertility was assessed by mating Asb1-KO, heterozygous (HET), or WT males with WT females for 3 months.
factor_value: Asb1-KO males were mated with WT females for 3 months.
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: Male fertility was assessed by mating Asb1-KO, heterozygous (HET), or WT males with WT females for 3 months.
